arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag breaks silence on Dan Ashworth relationship amid Man United sack talk
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag is under pressure at Manchester United after a dismal start to the season and the Dutchman has now spoken out about his relationship with Dan Ashworth

arts.ttl: I won Treble with Man United – but Sir Alex Ferguson almost sacked me before I apologised
arts.sum: Peter Schmeichel has recalled the moment he almost got the sack at Manchester United after he lost his temper with Sir Alex Ferguson following a tough day at the office

arts.ttl: What Zinedine Zidane Said to David Beckham after Man Utd 4-3 Real Madrid
arts.sum: David Beckham has revealed what Zinedine Zidane said to him after the famous Champions League match between Man Utd and Real Madrid in 2003

arts.ttl: Liverpool already know Ruud van Nistelrooy and Erik ten Hag’s view on 'new £42m target'
arts.sum: Manchester United duo Erik ten Hag and Ruud van Nistelrooy have both previously been linked with a move for one Euro 2024 star, who is gaining interest at Liverpool

arts.ttl: 'Man Utd had small, closed mentality – they made me pay £1 for a fruit juice'
arts.sum: The iconic Zlatan Ibrahimovic enjoyed a stellar stint at Old Trafford from 2016 to 2018, but he has since bemoaned goings on behind the scenes at Manchester United

arts.ttl: Key Manchester United figures frustrated by missed £100m transfer opportunity
arts.sum: Some key figures at Manchester United are reportedly frustrated that they may well have missed out on banking as much as £100million for their former player Mason Greenwood in the future. The 23-year-old came up through the Man Utd academy and had made a real impression in their first-team before being arrested and subsequently suspended […] The post Key Manchester United figures frustrated by missed £100m transfer opportunity appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Racehorse of former Man United boss Sir Alex Ferguson to chase huge international prize fund
arts.sum: Spirit Dancer is set to make his return to action at Newmarket on October 12 before bidding to become the first dual winner of the Bahrain International Trophy

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag slammed by Premier League’s ‘worst ever manager’ in brutal rant
arts.sum: Frank de Boer has labelled Manchester United as being "wobbly" and "in a bad state" after watching their recent 3-0 Premier League thrashing at the hands of Spurs at Old Trafford

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans FUME Jadon Sancho 'deserves' a place in England's squad while others back Lee Carsley's 'lovely' judgement after naming his second team for Nations League clashes
arts.sum: England fans reacted to Lee Carsley's second squad announcement with a mixture of reviews as Chelsea supporters fumed that Jadon Sancho wasn't selected, while others were impressed.

arts.ttl: Ruud van Nistelrooy’s four key qualities which could make him ideal to replace Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy has been backed to succeed Erik ten Hag as Manchester United manager by his fellow Dutchman Rene Meuelensteen, should the current boss be shown the door in the near future
